summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ScriptM8 5-part update. All branding updated to ScriptM8, home layout restructured with AI Coaching + Script Tools sections, navigation working, backend APIs responding within timeout, error handling with structured messages implemented.

issues: Email domains still use @scriptmate.app (privacy@scriptmate.app, legal@scriptmate.app, support@scriptmate.app) - minor, as these are contact emails not visible branding

action_items: Consider updating email domains from @scriptmate.app to @scriptm8.app in privacy.tsx, terms.tsx, support.tsx (optional, low priority)
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Branding: app.json name='ScriptM8', all UI text shows 'ScriptM8', OnboardingTutorial shows 'Welcome to ScriptM8'
✅ eas.json production env has EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly set
✅ app.json extra field has EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL fallback for Constants
✅ All axios calls in scriptStore.ts have timeout: API_TIMEOUT (15000ms)
✅ upload.tsx has UPLOAD_TIMEOUT (30s) for file uploads
✅ getErrorMessage() provides structured error messages (timeout, network, file size, file type, server error)
✅ Home layout: AI Coaching section (4 tiles) + Script Tools section (4 tiles) + Self Tape Studio featured
✅ Navigation: All tiles navigate to correct routes (/acting-coach, /dialect-coach, /scripts, /upload, /auditions, /dashboard, /selftape)
Note: AsyncStorage keys and bundleIdentifier use 'scriptmate' internally - these are technical identifiers not visible to users
seed_data_creation: Created test scripts during API testing (TEST_* prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ScriptM8 5-part update fully tested. Key files: app/index.tsx (home screen), store/scriptStore.ts (API calls with timeout), app/upload.tsx (file upload with timeout), app.json & eas.json (production URL config). Internal storage keys and bundleIdentifier still use 'scriptmate' prefix - these are technical identifiers. Email domains in legal pages use @scriptmate.app.

tests_performed.test: Branding - ScriptM8 title on home screen
Branding - 'AI Training Studio for Actors' tagline
Home layout - AI Coaching section (Acting Coach, Dialect Coach, Practice Scene, Record Self Tape)
Home layout - Script Tools section (My Scripts, New Script, Auditions, Dashboard)
Home layout - Self Tape Studio featured at top
API Config - eas.json production env has EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL
API Config - app.json extra field has EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL
Error handling - Timeout errors return 'Request timed out...'
Error handling - Network errors return 'Unable to reach server...'
